zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Dunbar於大約1225年出生時，她的父親Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar41歲，母親Countess Euphemia Stewart25歲。她和Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1269年之後在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Dunbar于大约1225年出生时，她的父亲Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar41岁，母亲Countess Euphemia Stewart25岁。她和Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1269年之后在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Dunbar was born about 1225, her father, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, was 41 and her mother, Countess Euphemia Stewart, was 25. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering. She died after 1269, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Dunbar est née environ 1225, son père, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Countess Euphemia Stewart, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering. Elle est décédée après 1269, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Dunbar um 1225 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar 41 und ihre Mutter Countess Euphemia Stewart 25. Sie hatte mit Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1269 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Dunbar è nata il circa 1225, sua padre, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Countess Euphemia Stewart, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering. Morì dopo il 1269, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunbarが約1225年に生まれた時，父Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbarは41歳，母Countess Euphemia Stewartは25歳であった。彼女はLord Roger FitzJohn de Claveringとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1269年以後にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Dunbar(이)가 대략 1225년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Euphemia Stewart(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1269년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Dunbar nasceu aproximadamente 1225, seu pai, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Countess Euphemia Stewart, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering. Ela faleceu após 1269, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Dunbar родилась около 1225 г., её отцу по имени Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Countess Euphemia Stewart, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering. Она умерла после 1269 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Dunbar nació aproximadamente 1225, su papá, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Countess Euphemia Stewart, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Lord Roger FitzJohn de Clavering. Murió después de 1269, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
